items.title: Microsoft Raises Quarterly Dividend by 9.6%
items.description: Microsoft’s pattern of increasing its dividend in September continued as the company raised its quarterly payout to 91 cents a share from 83 cents.

items.title: The Japanese Business Philosophy Fueling Microsoft’s AI Transformation
items.description: The Japanese Business Philosophy Fueling Microsoft’s AI Transformation

items.title: Microsoft announces quarterly dividend increase
items.description: Microsoft Corp. on Monday announced that its board of directors declared a quarterly dividend of $0.91 per share, reflecting an 8 cent or 10% increase over the previous quarter's dividend. The dividend is payable Dec. 11, 2025, to shareholders of record on Nov. 20, 2025. The ex-dividend date will be Nov. 20, 2025.

items.title: With no DOJ breakup, Alphabet becomes a $3 trillion company
items.description: Investors continue to reward Alphabet's stock after a judge declined to break up Google earlier this month.

items.title: Stocks Rally as Bond Yields Fall Before FOMC Meeting
items.description: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) on Monday closed up +0.47%, the Dow Jones Industrials Index ($DOWI ) (DIA ) closed up +0.11%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) closed up +0.84%. September E-mini S&P futures (ESU25 ) rose +0.43%, and September E-mini Nasdaq futures...
